panels.description: Indoor temperature (solid = observed, dashed = forecast) against the forecast-driven target band. The band widens on sunny days and narrows on cloudy days. Gray line shows outdoor temperature for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor Temp"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     temp_f::float AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).temp_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar W/m²" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM climate WHERE solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
    date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time, solar_w_m2 AS "Solar Forecast"
FROM weather_forecast WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 82 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 84 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 86 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Temperature vs Target Band

panels.description: Indoor VPD (solid = observed, dashed = forecast) against the forecast-driven target band. The band widens when outdoor humidity is low. Gray line shows outdoor relative humidity for context.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(vpd_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time,
     (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     vpd_kpa::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

WITH timeline AS (
    SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes') AS ts
)
SELECT t.ts AS time,
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_low::float AS "Band Low",
    (fn_band_setpoints(t.ts)).vpd_high::float AS "Band High"
FROM timeline t ORDER BY t.ts

SELECT ts AS time,
    (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.8 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister South" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.9 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister West" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister Center" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.1 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: VPD vs Target Band

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor Avg Temp
$/Day Avg

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND cost_total > 0

panels.description: Average daily total cost across the selected period
Shows outdoor solar irradiance, one of the main drivers of greenhouse heat gain.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Outdoor Solar Irradiance
kWh

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(kwh_estimated) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Estimated kWh from equipment runtimes × rated wattages

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, SUM(therms_estimated) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
SELECT now() AS time, SUM(water_used_gal) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)

panels.description: Shows the sequence of controller states over the last 24 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "State" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: State Timeline (24h)

panels.description: Solid = Tempest observed. Dashed = Open-Meteo forecast. Includes feels-like and dew point.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), temp_f AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT $__time(ts), feels_like_f AS "Feels Like" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND feels_like_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), dew_point AS "Dew Point" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dew_point IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wet_bulb_temp_f AS "Wet Bulb" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wet_bulb_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Indoor vs Outdoor Temperature

panels.description: Shows humidity behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Observed RH" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), rh_pct AS "Forecast RH" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Indoor vs Outdoor Humidity

panels.description: VPD intensity by hour of day across dates. Dark = high VPD stress.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(vpd_avg)::numeric, 2) AS "VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE ts > now() - interval '14 days' AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: VPD Heatmap (Hour × Day)

panels.description: Direct temperature comparison for the three most important growing zones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, temp_south AS "South Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_east AS "East Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_west AS "West Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Zone Temperature Comparison

panels.description: Direct VPD comparison for the three main growing zones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, vpd_south AS "South VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_east AS "East VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_west AS "West VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Zone VPD Comparison
